initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(client.client_id)) AS female_percentage
FROM client
JOIN account ON client.district_id = account.district_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 > 10000;

    (COUNT(CASE WHEN client.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(client.client_id)) AS female_percentage
